ddls:
CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the multiple-choice question */,
  "correct_answer" TEXT /* Correct answer option for the question */,
  "distractor_1" TEXT /* First distractor option for the question */,
  "distractor_2" TEXT /* Second distractor option for the question */,
  "distractor_3" TEXT /* Third distractor option for the question */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the topic associated with the question */,
  "complexity_level" INTEGER /* ID referencing the complexity level of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple-choice, true/false) */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the question was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date of the last modification to the question */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the question */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the question (e.g., textbook, journal article) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_complexity_level FOREIGN KEY ("complexity_level") REFERENCES complexity_levels ("complexity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the biological topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic, if any */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the topic */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the topic was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_parent_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complexity_levels" (
  "complexity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complexity level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the complexity level (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complexity level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the complexity level */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the complexity level was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complexity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complexity_levels_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_title" TEXT /* Title or name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., article, video, paper) */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* URL or path to the resource */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic linked to the resource */,
  "resource_author" TEXT /* Author of the resource */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the resource */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date the resource was last accessed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the resource based on user feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., educator, student, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user taking the assessment */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question answered */,
  "correct" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the answer was correct or not */,
  "attempt_date" TEXT /* Date when the question was attempted */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent on the question (in seconds) */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the user in their answer */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the user's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)
